channel.title: GitHub RobotFramework Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of RobotFramework in GitHub

item.title: SFDO-Community-Sprints/Geo-Reporting-PMM
item.description: This project will figure out how to extend PMM to facilitate easier geographic reporting to meet the needs of funders, donors, and nonprofit staff.

item.title: robotframework/WebDemo
item.description: Robot Framework web testing demo using SeleniumLibrary
